title: Wave Design & Sector Generation

use_cases: Edit spawn group parameters (begin wave, end wave, spacing, unitAmount, unitScaling, max, shields, shieldScaling)
Set boss/guardian status effect on group
Set spawn point for group (via spawner.getSpawns())
Preview total unit count per wave (Mode.totals)
Toggle visibility of individual unit types
Hover over wave column to inspect unit breakdown
Select planet (from accessible planets with generator)
Apply sector generation (loads map into editor via world.loadSector)
View list of active map patches
Load selected map into editor (via Cons<Map> loader callback)

key_relationships: WaveInfoDialog extends BaseDialog, contains WaveGraph instance
WaveInfoDialog calls graph.rebuild() on every group change via updateWaves()
WaveGraph extends Table, reads SpawnGroup.getSpawned(wave) to compute values[][]
WaveGraph.Mode enum: counts | totals | health (toggleable by user)
SectorGenerateDialog extends BaseDialog, calls world.loadSector(sector, WorldParams) via editor.load()
SectorGenerateDialog calls editor.clearOp(), editor.updateRenderer(), logic.reset() on apply
MapPatchesDialog extends BaseDialog, reads/writes state.patcher.patches, calls state.patcher.apply(patches)
MapPatchesDialog uses Jval.read() for patch JSON validation
MapLoadDialog extends BaseDialog, constructed with Cons<Map> loader callback
MapLoadDialog calls maps.all() to populate map browser
system_interactions: WaveInfoDialog → spawner.reset() / spawner.getSpawns() : spawn point selection
important_notes: WaveInfoDialog: hidden() saves groups back to state.rules.spawns
WaveInfoDialog: shown() deep-copies rules.spawns via JsonIO.copy (or uses waves.get() default)
WaveGraph: tracks pan/zoom state; from/to range triggers rebuild() when viewport changes
WaveGraph: hidden UnitType set maintained independently of used OrderedSet
SectorGenerateDialog: strips preset from sector before generation, restores after (documented as 'massive hack')
SectorGenerateDialog: clears editor.tags genfilters on apply
MapPatchesDialog: on add failure, restores oldPatches snapshot
MapLoadDialog: selected map cleared on hide(); load button disabled until selection made
